user.title: Connect to Google Keep
user.description: Enter your Google account email and either your password or a previously obtained master token.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Google Keep
reauth_confirm.description: Your Google Keep session for {email} expired. Please re-enter your password.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email, password, or master token.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Google. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.missing_credentials: You must provide either a password or a master token.
error.unknown: Unexpected error, check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Google account is already configured.

data.label_filter: Only sync notes/lists with these labels
data.color_filter: Only sync notes/lists with these colors

sync.name: Sync
sync.description: Force an immediate synchronization with Google Keep.

config_entry_id.name: Account
config_entry_id.description: Optional - limit the sync to a single Google Keep account.

create_note.name: Create note
create_note.description: Create a new plain text note in Google Keep.

labels.name: Labels
labels.description: Labels to apply to the note.

create_checklist.name: Create checklist
create_checklist.description: Create a new checklist (shopping list style) note in Google Keep.

items.name: Items
items.description: List of item texts to pre-populate the checklist with.

add_item.name: Add item
add_item.description: Add an item to an existing Google Keep checklist.

list_id.name: List ID
list_id.description: The id of the target list.

remove_item.name: Remove item
remove_item.description: Remove an item from a Google Keep checklist.

list_id.name: List ID
list_id.description: The id of the target list.

item_id.name: Item ID
item_id.description: The id of the item to remove.

complete_item.name: Complete item
complete_item.description: Mark a checklist item as checked/complete.

list_id.name: List ID
list_id.description: The id of the target list.

item_id.name: Item ID
item_id.description: The id of the item to complete.

uncomplete_item.name: Uncomplete item
uncomplete_item.description: Mark a checklist item as unchecked.

list_id.name: List ID
list_id.description: The id of the target list.

item_id.name: Item ID
item_id.description: The id of the item to uncheck.

archive.name: Archive note
archive.description: Archive a Google Keep note or list.

note_id.name: Note ID
note_id.description: The id of the note/list to archive.

unarchive.name: Unarchive note
unarchive.description: Unarchive a Google Keep note or list.

note_id.name: Note ID
note_id.description: The id of the note/list to unarchive.

delete_note.name: Delete note
delete_note.description: Move a Google Keep note or list to trash.

note_id.name: Note ID
note_id.description: The id of the note/list to trash.

restore_note.name: Restore note
restore_note.description: Restore a trashed Google Keep note or list.

note_id.name: Note ID
note_id.description: The id of the note/list to restore.
